item.title: AroundTheNFL: Around The NFL @AroundTheNFL · 15min Most 2026 NFL mock drafts explore what each team COULD do, but how about what every
item.description:
Around The NFL @AroundTheNFL · 15min Most 2026 NFL mock drafts explore what each team COULD do, but how about what everyone SHOULD do? @adamrank simulates the entire first round, 1-32, with full bias -- and Ohio State WR Carnell Tate flies off the board almost immediately
https:// nfl.com/news/2026-nfl- mock-draft-with-a-twist-what-every-team-should-do-in-round-1 … 2 1 4 5 mil
